title: Email & Calendar MCP Integration Audit & Repair
summary: Transition Outlook email skills to use Microsoft Graph PowerShell, create proper skill reference files, install Google Gmail/Calendar MCP server, create Outlook calendar skills, and document test plan.
keyOutcomes: All 5 Outlook email skills refactored to use Graph PowerShell cmdlets
Skill reference files created for all Outlook skills detailing PowerShell execution
Google Gmail/Calendar MCP server installed and authenticated
Comprehensive test plan for all email/calendar integrations
risks: Graph PowerShell may require manual device code auth if token is expired
Google OAuth2 requires manual browser interaction
Google MCP server may be unstable or abandoned
dependencies: Google Cloud project with Gmail/Calendar API enabled
Microsoft 365 account with Graph API permissions
deliverables: Google MCP server configuration in opencode.json
validationCriteria: Each Outlook email skill successfully invokes ms365 tools
Google Gmail read + send works via MCP
Google Calendar list + create works via MCP
Calendar skills return real event data
Test plan covers all CRUD operations for both platforms
